{"file_path": "/home/eren/Documents/task4/Compliance Console/repo/API_tests/reconciliation_workflow_test.sh", "content": "#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

###############################################################################
# Reconciliation Workflow Integration Tests
#
# Tests the full reconciliation lifecycle: import feeds, run matching, check
# exceptions, assign, resolve, export, and summary.
#
# Prerequisites:
#   - Backend running on localhost:8080
#   - Admin user: admin / Admin12345!!!
###############################################################################

BASE_URL="http://localhost:8080/api"
JAR="$(mktemp /tmp/recon_test.XXXXXX)"
PASS=0
FAIL=0
TOTAL=0

trap 'rm -f "$JAR"' EXIT

check() {
  local description="$1"
  local expected_code="$2"
  local actual_code="$3"
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if [ "$actual_code" -eq "$expected_code" ]; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: $description (HTTP $actual_code)"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: $description (expected $expected_code, got $actual_code)"
  fi
}

json_field() {
  echo "$1" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('$2',''))" 2>/dev/null || true
}

json_len() {
  echo "$1" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d) if isinstance(d,list) else len(d.get('$2',[])))" 2>/dev/null || echo "0"
}

###############################################################################
# Login
###############################################################################
echo "=== Admin Login ==="
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"username":"admin","password":"Admin12345!!!"}' \
  -c "$JAR")
check "Admin login" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 1. Import Internal Feed (CSV)
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Import Internal Feed ==="

# Create a temporary CSV file with internal transactions
INT_CSV="$(mktemp /tmp/internal_feed.XXXXXX.csv)"
cat > "$INT_CSV" <<'CSVEOF'
date,amount,counterparty,counterparty_account,memo,reference
2026-04-01,1500.00,Acme Corp,ACC-001,Wire payment ref-001,REF001
2026-04-01,750.50,Globex Inc,ACC-002,Invoice 2026-100,REF002
2026-04-02,250.00,Initech,ACC-003,Monthly retainer,REF003
2026-04-02,3200.00,Umbrella Corp,ACC-004,Consulting fees Q1,REF004
2026-04-03,125.75,Stark Industries,ACC-005,Equipment rental,REF005
CSVEOF

RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/import" \
  -F "feed_type=internal" \
  -F "file=@$INT_CSV;filename=internal_feed.csv" \
  -b "$JAR")
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/import" \
  -F "feed_type=internal" \
  -F "file=@$INT_CSV;filename=internal_feed_2.csv" \
  -b "$JAR")
INT_FEED_ID=$(json_field "$RESP" "feed_id")
echo "  Internal feed ID: ${INT_FEED_ID:-<failed>}"
check "Import internal feed" 201 "$code"
rm -f "$INT_CSV"

###############################################################################
# 2. Import External Feed (CSV)
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Import External Feed ==="

EXT_CSV="$(mktemp /tmp/external_feed.XXXXXX.csv)"
cat > "$EXT_CSV" <<'CSVEOF'
date,amount,counterparty,counterparty_account,memo,reference
2026-04-01,1500.00,Acme Corp,ACC-001,Wire payment ref-001,REF001
2026-04-01,750.50,Globex Inc,ACC-002,Invoice 2026-100,REF002
2026-04-02,251.25,Initech,ACC-003,Monthly retainer,REF003
2026-04-02,3200.00,Umbrella Corp,ACC-004,Consulting fees Q1,REF004
2026-04-04,999.99,Unknown Vendor,ACC-099,Suspicious transaction,REF999
CSVEOF

RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/import" \
  -F "feed_type=external" \
  -F "file=@$EXT_CSV;filename=external_feed.csv" \
  -b "$JAR")
EXT_FEED_ID=$(json_field "$RESP" "feed_id")
echo "  External feed ID: ${EXT_FEED_ID:-<failed>}"
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/feeds" -b "$JAR")
check "List feeds after import" 200 "$code"
rm -f "$EXT_CSV"

###############################################################################
# 3. Feed Validation
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Feed Validation ==="

# Invalid feed type
INVALID_CSV="$(mktemp /tmp/invalid.XXXXXX.csv)"
echo "date,amount" > "$INVALID_CSV"
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/import" \
  -F "feed_type=invalid_type" \
  -F "file=@$INVALID_CSV;filename=test.csv" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Invalid feed_type => 400" 400 "$code"
rm -f "$INVALID_CSV"

# Get specific feed
if [ -n "$INT_FEED_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/feeds/$INT_FEED_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get feed by ID" 200 "$code"
fi

# Non-existent feed
FAKE_UUID="00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000099"
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/feeds/$FAKE_UUID" -b "$JAR")
check "Get non-existent feed => 404" 404 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 4. Run Matching
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Run Matching ==="

if [ -n "$INT_FEED_ID" ]; then
  MATCH_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/feeds/$INT_FEED_ID/match" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -b "$JAR")
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/feeds/$INT_FEED_ID/match" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -b "$JAR")
  # Second match on same feed is OK (may not find new matches)
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if [ "$code" = "200" ] || [ "$code" = "201" ]; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: Run matching on feed (HTTP $code)"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: Run matching (expected 200/201, got $code)"
  fi
fi

###############################################################################
# 5. Get Match Results
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Match Results ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/matches" -b "$JAR")
check "List all matches" 200 "$code"

if [ -n "$INT_FEED_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" \
    "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/matches?feed_id=$INT_FEED_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "List matches filtered by feed_id" 200 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 6. Exceptions
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Exceptions ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions" -b "$JAR")
check "List exceptions" 200 "$code"

# Filter by status
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions?status=open" -b "$JAR")
check "List open exceptions" 200 "$code"

# Filter by severity
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions?severity=high" -b "$JAR")
check "List high severity exceptions" 200 "$code"

# Filter by type
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions?type=unmatched" -b "$JAR")
check "List unmatched exceptions" 200 "$code"

# Get an exception ID for further testing
EXCEPTIONS=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions" -b "$JAR")
EXCEPTION_ID=$(echo "$EXCEPTIONS" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
items = data if isinstance(data, list) else data.get('exceptions', data.get('items', []))
if items:
    print(items[0]['id'])
" 2>/dev/null || true)

if [ -n "$EXCEPTION_ID" ]; then
  # Get single exception
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get exception by ID" 200 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 7. Assign Exception
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Assign Exception ==="

if [ -n "$EXCEPTION_ID" ]; then
  # Get admin user ID
  SESSION=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/auth/session" -b "$JAR")
  ADMIN_USER_ID=$(echo "$SESSION" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('id',''))" 2>/dev/null || true)

  if [ -n "$ADMIN_USER_ID" ]; then
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT \
      "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID/assign" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d "{\"assigned_to\":\"$ADMIN_USER_ID\"}" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Assign exception to admin" 200 "$code"

    # Verify status changed to in_progress
    EXC_RESP=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID" -b "$JAR")
    exc_status=$(json_field "$EXC_RESP" "status")
    TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
    if [ "$exc_status" = "in_progress" ]; then
      PASS=$((PASS + 1))
      echo "  PASS: Exception status = in_progress after assignment"
    else
      FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
      echo "  FAIL: Exception status = '$exc_status', expected 'in_progress'"
    fi
  fi
fi

###############################################################################
# 8. Resolve Exception
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Resolve Exception ==="

if [ -n "$EXCEPTION_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT \
    "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID/resolve" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"disposition":"approved","resolution_notes":"Variance within acceptable range after manual review."}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Resolve exception" 200 "$code"

  # Verify status changed to resolved
  EXC_RESP=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID" -b "$JAR")
  exc_status=$(json_field "$EXC_RESP" "status")
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if [ "$exc_status" = "resolved" ]; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: Exception status = resolved"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: Exception status = '$exc_status', expected 'resolved'"
  fi

  # Resolve without required fields
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT \
    "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID/resolve" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Resolve without disposition => 400" 400 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 9. Assign to non-existent user
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Assign Validation ==="

# Get another open exception if available
OPEN_EXC_ID=$(echo "$EXCEPTIONS" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
items = data if isinstance(data, list) else data.get('exceptions', data.get('items', []))
for e in items:
    if e.get('status') == 'open':
        print(e['id'])
        break
" 2>/dev/null || true)

if [ -n "$OPEN_EXC_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT \
    "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$OPEN_EXC_ID/assign" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"assigned_to":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000099"}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Assign to non-existent user => 400/404" "$code" "$code"
  # Accept whatever error code — key is it should not be 200
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if [ "$code" != "200" ]; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: Assign to fake user rejected (HTTP $code)"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: Assign to fake user returned 200"
  fi
fi

###############################################################################
# 10. Export Exceptions
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Export Exceptions ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/export" -b "$JAR")
check "Export exceptions as CSV (default)" 200 "$code"

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/export?format=csv" -b "$JAR")
check "Export exceptions as CSV (explicit)" 200 "$code"

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/export?format=xlsx" -b "$JAR")
check "Export exceptions as XLSX" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 11. Reconciliation Summary
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Reconciliation Summary ==="

SUMMARY=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/summary" -b "$JAR")
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/summary" -b "$JAR")
check "Get reconciliation summary" 200 "$code"

# Verify summary has expected fields
TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
has_fields=$(echo "$SUMMARY" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
needed = ['total_feeds', 'total_transactions', 'total_matched', 'total_exceptions']
print('yes' if all(k in d for k in needed) else 'no')
" 2>/dev/null || echo "no")
if [ "$has_fields" = "yes" ]; then
  PASS=$((PASS + 1))
  echo "  PASS: Summary contains expected fields"
else
  FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
  echo "  FAIL: Summary missing expected fields"
fi

###############################################################################
# 12. Pagination
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Pagination ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/feeds?page=1&per_page=2" -b "$JAR")
check "List feeds page 1, per_page 2" 200 "$code"

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions?page=1&per_page=5" -b "$JAR")
check "List exceptions page 1, per_page 5" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# Summary
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "============================================"
echo "Reconciliation Workflow Tests: $PASS/$TOTAL passed, $FAIL failed"
echo "============================================"

if [ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ]; then
  exit 1
fi
"}

if [ -n "$EXCEPTION_ID" ]; then
  # Get single exception
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get exception by ID" 200 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 7. Assign Exception
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Assign Exception ==="

if [ -n "$EXCEPTION_ID" ]; then
  # Get admin user ID
  SESSION=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/auth/session" -b "$JAR")
  ADMIN_USER_ID=$(echo "$SESSION" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('id',''))" 2>/dev/null || true)

  if [ -n "$ADMIN_USER_ID" ]; then
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT \
      "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID/assign" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d "{\"assigned_to\":\"$ADMIN_USER_ID\"}" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Assign exception to admin" 200 "$code"

    # Verify status changed to in_progress
    EXC_RESP=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID" -b "$JAR")
    exc_status=$(json_field "$EXC_RESP" "status")
    TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
    if [ "$exc_status" = "in_progress" ]; then
      PASS=$((PASS + 1))
      echo "  PASS: Exception status = in_progress after assignment"
    else
      FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
      echo "  FAIL: Exception status = '$exc_status', expected 'in_progress'"
    fi
  fi
fi

###############################################################################
# 8. Resolve Exception
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Resolve Exception ==="

if [ -n "$EXCEPTION_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT \
    "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID/resolve" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"disposition":"approved","resolution_notes":"Variance within acceptable range after manual review."}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Resolve exception" 200 "$code"

  # Verify status changed to resolved
  EXC_RESP=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID" -b "$JAR")
  exc_status=$(json_field "$EXC_RESP" "status")
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if [ "$exc_status" = "resolved" ]; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: Exception status = resolved"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: Exception status = '$exc_status', expected 'resolved'"
  fi

  # Resolve without required fields
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT \
    "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$EXCEPTION_ID/resolve" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Resolve without disposition => 400" 400 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 9. Assign to non-existent user
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Assign Validation ==="

# Get another open exception if available
OPEN_EXC_ID=$(echo "$EXCEPTIONS" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
items = data if isinstance(data, list) else data.get('exceptions', data.get('items', []))
for e in items:
    if e.get('status') == 'open':
        print(e['id'])
        break
" 2>/dev/null || true)

if [ -n "$OPEN_EXC_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT \
    "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/$OPEN_EXC_ID/assign" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"assigned_to":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000099"}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Assign to non-existent user => 400/404" "$code" "$code"
  # Accept whatever error code — key is it should not be 200
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if [ "$code" != "200" ]; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: Assign to fake user rejected (HTTP $code)"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: Assign to fake user returned 200"
  fi
fi

###############################################################################
# 10. Export Exceptions
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Export Exceptions ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/export" -b "$JAR")
check "Export exceptions as CSV (default)" 200 "$code"

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/export?format=csv" -b "$JAR")
check "Export exceptions as CSV (explicit)" 200 "$code"

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions/export?format=xlsx" -b "$JAR")
check "Export exceptions as XLSX" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 11. Reconciliation Summary
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Reconciliation Summary ==="

SUMMARY=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/summary" -b "$JAR")
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/summary" -b "$JAR")
check "Get reconciliation summary" 200 "$code"

# Verify summary has expected fields
TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
has_fields=$(echo "$SUMMARY" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
needed = ['total_feeds', 'total_transactions', 'total_matched', 'total_exceptions']
print('yes' if all(k in d for k in needed) else 'no')
" 2>/dev/null || echo "no")
if [ "$has_fields" = "yes" ]; then
  PASS=$((PASS + 1))
  echo "  PASS: Summary contains expected fields"
else
  FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
  echo "  FAIL: Summary missing expected fields"
fi

###############################################################################
# 12. Pagination
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Pagination ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/feeds?page=1&per_page=2" -b "$JAR")
check "List feeds page 1, per_page 2" 200 "$code"

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/reconciliation/exceptions?page=1&per_page=5" -b "$JAR")
check "List exceptions page 1, per_page 5" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# Summary
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "============================================"
echo "Reconciliation Workflow Tests: $PASS/$TOTAL passed, $FAIL failed"
echo "============================================"

if [ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ]; then
  exit 1
fi
"}

{"file_path": "/home/eren/Documents/task4/Compliance Console/repo/API_tests/security_lifecycle_test.sh", "content": "#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

###############################################################################
# Security & Data Lifecycle Integration Tests
#
# Tests sensitive data storage/retrieval/masking/deletion, encryption key
# management, audit ledger integrity, retention policies, legal holds,
# and rate limit status.
#
# Prerequisites:
#   - Backend running on localhost:8080
#   - Admin user: admin / Admin12345!!!
###############################################################################

BASE_URL="http://localhost:8080/api"
JAR="$(mktemp /tmp/sec_test.XXXXXX)"
PASS=0
FAIL=0
TOTAL=0

trap 'rm -f "$JAR"' EXIT

check() {
  local description="$1"
  local expected_code="$2"
  local actual_code="$3"
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if [ "$actual_code" -eq "$expected_code" ]; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: $description (HTTP $actual_code)"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: $description (expected $expected_code, got $actual_code)"
  fi
}

json_field() {
  echo "$1" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('$2',''))" 2>/dev/null || true
}

###############################################################################
# Login
###############################################################################
echo "=== Admin Login ==="
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"username":"admin","password":"Admin12345!!!"}' \
  -c "$JAR")
check "Admin login" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 1. Store Sensitive Data
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Store Sensitive Data ==="

# Store a bank account
RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"data_type":"bank_account","value":"9876543210","label":"Main Operating Account"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"data_type":"bank_account","value":"9876543210","label":"Main Operating Account"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
SENSITIVE_ID=$(json_field "$RESP" "id")
echo "  Stored sensitive data ID: ${SENSITIVE_ID:-<failed>}"
check "Store bank account" 201 "$code"

# Store a tax ID
TAX_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"data_type":"tax_id","value":"12-3456789","label":"Federal Tax ID"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
TAX_ID=$(json_field "$TAX_RESP" "id")
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"data_type":"ssn","value":"123-45-6789","label":"Employee SSN"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Store SSN" 201 "$code"

# Store credit card
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"data_type":"credit_card","value":"4111111111111111","label":"Corporate Card"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Store credit card" 201 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 2. Validation
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Sensitive Data Validation ==="

# Missing data_type
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"value":"some_value"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Store without data_type => 400" 400 "$code"

# Missing value
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"data_type":"bank_account"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Store without value => 400" 400 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 3. Retrieve Sensitive Data (Masked)
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Retrieve Masked Data ==="

if [ -n "$SENSITIVE_ID" ]; then
  RESP=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$SENSITIVE_ID" -b "$JAR")
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$SENSITIVE_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get sensitive data (masked)" 200 "$code"

  # Verify the response contains masked value, not the original
  masked=$(json_field "$RESP" "masked_value")
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if echo "$masked" | grep -q '\*'; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: Value is masked ($masked)"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: Value does not appear masked: '$masked'"
  fi

  # Verify original value is NOT in the response
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if echo "$RESP" | grep -q '9876543210'; then
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: Original value leaked in masked response"
  else
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: Original value not present in masked response"
  fi
fi

###############################################################################
# 4. List Sensitive Data
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== List Sensitive Data ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive" -b "$JAR")
check "List all sensitive data" 200 "$code"

LIST_RESP=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive" -b "$JAR")
# Verify no plaintext values in list response
TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
if echo "$LIST_RESP" | grep -qE '9876543210|12-3456789|123-45-6789|4111111111111111'; then
  FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
  echo "  FAIL: Plaintext values found in list response"
else
  PASS=$((PASS + 1))
  echo "  PASS: No plaintext values in list response"
fi

###############################################################################
# 5. Reveal Sensitive Data (Admin Only)
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Reveal Sensitive Data ==="

if [ -n "$SENSITIVE_ID" ]; then
  REVEAL_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$SENSITIVE_ID/reveal" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -b "$JAR")
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$SENSITIVE_ID/reveal" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Reveal sensitive data" 200 "$code"
fi

# Non-existent ID
FAKE_UUID="00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000099"
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$FAKE_UUID/reveal" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Reveal non-existent => 404" 404 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 6. Encryption Key Management
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Encryption Keys ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/keys" -b "$JAR")
check "List encryption keys" 200 "$code"

# Rotation due check
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/keys/rotation-due" -b "$JAR")
check "Check rotation due" 200 "$code"

# Rotate key
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/keys/rotate" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"key_alias":"default"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Rotate encryption key" 200 "$code"

# Rotate without alias
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/keys/rotate" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Rotate without alias => 400" 400 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 7. Audit Ledger
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Audit Ledger ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/audit-ledger" -b "$JAR")
check "Get audit ledger" 200 "$code"

# With pagination
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/audit-ledger?page=1&per_page=10" -b "$JAR")
check "Audit ledger paginated" 200 "$code"

# With action filter
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/audit-ledger?action=login" -b "$JAR")
check "Audit ledger filtered by action" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 8. Verify Audit Chain Integrity
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Audit Chain Verification ==="

VERIFY_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/audit-ledger/verify" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -b "$JAR")
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/audit-ledger/verify" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Verify audit chain" 200 "$code"

# Verify the chain is valid
chain_valid=$(json_field "$VERIFY_RESP" "valid")
TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
if [ "$chain_valid" = "True" ] || [ "$chain_valid" = "true" ]; then
  PASS=$((PASS + 1))
  echo "  PASS: Audit chain integrity verified (valid=true)"
else
  FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
  echo "  FAIL: Audit chain integrity check returned valid=$chain_valid"
fi

###############################################################################
# 9. Retention Policies
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Retention Policies ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/retention" -b "$JAR")
check "List retention policies" 200 "$code"

# Run retention cleanup
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/retention/cleanup" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Run retention cleanup" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 10. Legal Holds
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Legal Holds ==="

# Create legal hold
HOLD_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"hold_reason":"Pending litigation - Case #2026-001","target_table":"audit_logs"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"hold_reason":"Regulatory audit - compliance review","target_table":"transactions"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
HOLD_ID=$(json_field "$HOLD_RESP" "id")
echo "  Legal hold ID: ${HOLD_ID:-<failed>}"
check "Create legal hold" 201 "$code"

# Create without required fields
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Create hold without reason => 400" 400 "$code"

# List legal holds
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds" -b "$JAR")
check "List legal holds" 200 "$code"

# Release legal hold
if [ -n "$HOLD_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds/$HOLD_ID/release" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Release legal hold" 200 "$code"

  # Double release should fail
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds/$HOLD_ID/release" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Double release hold => 404" 404 "$code"
fi

# Release non-existent hold
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds/$FAKE_UUID/release" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Release non-existent hold => 404" 404 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 11. Rate Limit Status
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Rate Limit Status ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/rate-limits" -b "$JAR")
check "Get rate limit status" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 12. Delete Sensitive Data
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Delete Sensitive Data ==="

if [ -n "$SENSITIVE_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$SENSITIVE_ID" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Delete sensitive data" 200 "$code"

  # Verify deleted
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$SENSITIVE_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get deleted data => 404" 404 "$code"
fi

# Delete non-existent
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$FAKE_UUID" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Delete non-existent => 404" 404 "$code"

###############################################################################
# Summary
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "============================================"
echo "Security Lifecycle Tests: $PASS/$TOTAL passed, $FAIL failed"
echo "============================================"

if [ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ]; then
  exit 1
fi
"}

    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: Value does not appear masked: '$masked'"
  fi

  # Verify original value is NOT in the response
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if echo "$RESP" | grep -q '9876543210'; then
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: Original value leaked in masked response"
  else
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: Original value not present in masked response"
  fi
fi

###############################################################################
# 4. List Sensitive Data
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== List Sensitive Data ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive" -b "$JAR")
check "List all sensitive data" 200 "$code"

LIST_RESP=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive" -b "$JAR")
# Verify no plaintext values in list response
TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
if echo "$LIST_RESP" | grep -qE '9876543210|12-3456789|123-45-6789|4111111111111111'; then
  FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
  echo "  FAIL: Plaintext values found in list response"
else
  PASS=$((PASS + 1))
  echo "  PASS: No plaintext values in list response"
fi

###############################################################################
# 5. Reveal Sensitive Data (Admin Only)
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Reveal Sensitive Data ==="

if [ -n "$SENSITIVE_ID" ]; then
  REVEAL_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$SENSITIVE_ID/reveal" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -b "$JAR")
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$SENSITIVE_ID/reveal" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Reveal sensitive data" 200 "$code"
fi

# Non-existent ID
FAKE_UUID="00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000099"
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$FAKE_UUID/reveal" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Reveal non-existent => 404" 404 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 6. Encryption Key Management
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Encryption Keys ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/keys" -b "$JAR")
check "List encryption keys" 200 "$code"

# Rotation due check
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/keys/rotation-due" -b "$JAR")
check "Check rotation due" 200 "$code"

# Rotate key
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/keys/rotate" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"key_alias":"default"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Rotate encryption key" 200 "$code"

# Rotate without alias
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/keys/rotate" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Rotate without alias => 400" 400 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 7. Audit Ledger
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Audit Ledger ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/audit-ledger" -b "$JAR")
check "Get audit ledger" 200 "$code"

# With pagination
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/audit-ledger?page=1&per_page=10" -b "$JAR")
check "Audit ledger paginated" 200 "$code"

# With action filter
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/audit-ledger?action=login" -b "$JAR")
check "Audit ledger filtered by action" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 8. Verify Audit Chain Integrity
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Audit Chain Verification ==="

VERIFY_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/audit-ledger/verify" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -b "$JAR")
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/audit-ledger/verify" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Verify audit chain" 200 "$code"

# Verify the chain is valid
chain_valid=$(json_field "$VERIFY_RESP" "valid")
TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
if [ "$chain_valid" = "True" ] || [ "$chain_valid" = "true" ]; then
  PASS=$((PASS + 1))
  echo "  PASS: Audit chain integrity verified (valid=true)"
else
  FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
  echo "  FAIL: Audit chain integrity check returned valid=$chain_valid"
fi

###############################################################################
# 9. Retention Policies
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Retention Policies ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/retention" -b "$JAR")
check "List retention policies" 200 "$code"

# Run retention cleanup
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/retention/cleanup" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Run retention cleanup" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 10. Legal Holds
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Legal Holds ==="

# Create legal hold
HOLD_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"hold_reason":"Pending litigation - Case #2026-001","target_table":"audit_logs"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"hold_reason":"Regulatory audit - compliance review","target_table":"transactions"}' \
  -b "$JAR")
HOLD_ID=$(json_field "$HOLD_RESP" "id")
echo "  Legal hold ID: ${HOLD_ID:-<failed>}"
check "Create legal hold" 201 "$code"

# Create without required fields
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Create hold without reason => 400" 400 "$code"

# List legal holds
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds" -b "$JAR")
check "List legal holds" 200 "$code"

# Release legal hold
if [ -n "$HOLD_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds/$HOLD_ID/release" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Release legal hold" 200 "$code"

  # Double release should fail
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds/$HOLD_ID/release" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Double release hold => 404" 404 "$code"
fi

# Release non-existent hold
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT "$BASE_URL/security/legal-holds/$FAKE_UUID/release" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Release non-existent hold => 404" 404 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 11. Rate Limit Status
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Rate Limit Status ==="

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/rate-limits" -b "$JAR")
check "Get rate limit status" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 12. Delete Sensitive Data
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Delete Sensitive Data ==="

if [ -n "$SENSITIVE_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$SENSITIVE_ID" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Delete sensitive data" 200 "$code"

  # Verify deleted
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$SENSITIVE_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get deleted data => 404" 404 "$code"
fi

# Delete non-existent
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/security/sensitive/$FAKE_UUID" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Delete non-existent => 404" 404 "$code"

###############################################################################
# Summary
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "============================================"
echo "Security Lifecycle Tests: $PASS/$TOTAL passed, $FAIL failed"
echo "============================================"

if [ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ]; then
  exit 1
fi
"}

{"file_path": "/home/eren/Documents/task4/Compliance Console/repo/API_tests/staff_scheduling_test.sh", "content": "#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

###############################################################################
# Staff & Scheduling Integration Tests
#
# Tests staff CRUD, credentials, availability, schedule creation with conflict
# detection, buffer enforcement, and capacity management.
#
# Prerequisites:
#   - Backend running on localhost:8080
#   - Admin user: admin / Admin12345!!!
###############################################################################

BASE_URL="http://localhost:8080/api"
JAR="$(mktemp /tmp/staff_test.XXXXXX)"
PASS=0
FAIL=0
TOTAL=0

trap 'rm -f "$JAR"' EXIT

check() {
  local description="$1"
  local expected_code="$2"
  local actual_code="$3"
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if [ "$actual_code" -eq "$expected_code" ]; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: $description (HTTP $actual_code)"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: $description (expected $expected_code, got $actual_code)"
  fi
}

json_field() {
  echo "$1" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('$2',''))" 2>/dev/null || true
}

###############################################################################
# Login
###############################################################################
echo "=== Admin Login ==="
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"username":"admin","password":"Admin12345!!!"}' \
  -c "$JAR")
check "Admin login" 200 "$code"

# Get admin user ID
SESSION=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/auth/session" -b "$JAR")
ADMIN_ID=$(json_field "$SESSION" "id")

###############################################################################
# 1. Service Creation (needed for scheduling)
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Service Setup ==="

SVC_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/services" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"Test Consulting","description":"Consulting service","base_price_usd":150,"tier":"standard","duration_minutes":60}' \
  -b "$JAR")
SVC_ID=$(json_field "$SVC_RESP" "id")
echo "  Service ID: ${SVC_ID:-<failed>}"

# Service validation: invalid duration
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/services" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"Bad Duration","base_price_usd":100,"tier":"standard","duration_minutes":17}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Invalid duration (17 min) => 400" 400 "$code"

# Service validation: invalid tier
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/services" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"Bad Tier","base_price_usd":100,"tier":"gold","duration_minutes":60}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Invalid tier => 400" 400 "$code"

# Service validation: missing name
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/services" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"base_price_usd":100,"tier":"standard","duration_minutes":60}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Service missing name => 400" 400 "$code"

# Service listing
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/services" -b "$JAR")
check "List services" 200 "$code"

# Get pricing
if [ -n "$SVC_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/services/$SVC_ID/pricing" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get base pricing" 200 "$code"

  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" \
    "$BASE_URL/services/$SVC_ID/pricing?after_hours=true&same_day=true" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get pricing with surcharges" 200 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 2. Staff CRUD
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Staff CRUD ==="

# Create staff
STAFF_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"user_id\":\"$ADMIN_ID\",\"full_name\":\"Test Staff Member\",\"specialization\":\"consulting\"}" \
  -b "$JAR")
STAFF_ID=$(json_field "$STAFF_RESP" "id")
echo "  Staff ID: ${STAFF_ID:-<failed>}"

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/staff" -b "$JAR")
check "List staff" 200 "$code"

if [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get staff by ID" 200 "$code"

  # Update staff
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"specialization":"audit"}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Update staff specialization" 200 "$code"
fi

# Create staff missing full_name
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"user_id\":\"$ADMIN_ID\"}" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Create staff missing name => 400" 400 "$code"

# Get non-existent staff
FAKE_UUID="00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000099"
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/staff/$FAKE_UUID" -b "$JAR")
check "Get non-existent staff => 404" 404 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 3. Staff Credentials
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Staff Credentials ==="

if [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  # Add credential
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/credentials" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"credential_name":"CPA License","issuing_authority":"State Board","credential_number":"CPA-12345","issued_date":"2024-01-15","expiry_date":"2027-01-15"}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Add credential" 201 "$code"

  # List credentials
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/credentials" -b "$JAR")
  check "List credentials" 200 "$code"

  # Add credential missing name
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/credentials" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"issuing_authority":"State Board"}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Add credential missing name => 400" 400 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 4. Staff Availability
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Staff Availability ==="

if [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  # Add availability (Monday 9am-5pm)
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/availability" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"day_of_week":1,"start_time":"09:00","end_time":"17:00","is_recurring":true}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Add availability" 201 "$code"

  # List availability
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/availability" -b "$JAR")
  check "List availability" 200 "$code"

  # Invalid day_of_week
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/availability" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"day_of_week":8,"start_time":"09:00","end_time":"17:00"}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Invalid day_of_week => 400" 400 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 5. Schedule Creation
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Schedule Creation ==="

if [ -n "$SVC_ID" ] && [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  # Create a schedule for tomorrow 10am-11am
  TOMORROW=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT10:00:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT10:00:00Z')
  TOMORROW_END=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT11:00:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT11:00:00Z')

  SCHED_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d "{\"service_id\":\"$SVC_ID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"client_name\":\"Test Client\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$TOMORROW\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$TOMORROW_END\"}" \
    -b "$JAR")
  SCHED_ID=$(json_field "$SCHED_RESP" "id")
  code_check=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/schedules" -b "$JAR")
  check "List schedules" 200 "$code_check"

  if [ -n "$SCHED_ID" ]; then
    echo "  Schedule ID: $SCHED_ID"

    # Overlapping schedule should fail (409)
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d "{\"service_id\":\"$SVC_ID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"client_name\":\"Overlap Client\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$TOMORROW\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$TOMORROW_END\"}" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Overlapping schedule => 409" 409 "$code"

    # Schedule within 30-min buffer should fail
    BUFFER_START=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT11:15:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT11:15:00Z')
    BUFFER_END=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT12:15:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT12:15:00Z')
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d "{\"service_id\":\"$SVC_ID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"client_name\":\"Buffer Violation\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$BUFFER_START\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$BUFFER_END\"}" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Schedule within 30-min buffer => 409" 409 "$code"

    # Schedule at exact 30-min boundary should succeed
    OK_START=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT11:30:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT11:30:00Z')
    OK_END=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT12:30:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT12:30:00Z')
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d "{\"service_id\":\"$SVC_ID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"client_name\":\"Buffer OK\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$OK_START\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$OK_END\"}" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Schedule at 30-min boundary => 201" 201 "$code"

    # Confirm assignment
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules/$SCHED_ID/confirm" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Confirm schedule assignment" 200 "$code"

    # Cancel schedule
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/schedules/$SCHED_ID" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Cancel schedule" 200 "$code"

    # Double cancel should fail
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/schedules/$SCHED_ID" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Double cancel => 400/404" "$code" "$code"
    TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
    if [ "$code" != "200" ]; then
      PASS=$((PASS + 1))
      echo "  PASS: Double cancel rejected (HTTP $code)"
    else
      FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
      echo "  FAIL: Double cancel should not return 200"
    fi
  fi
fi

###############################################################################
# 6. Schedule Validation
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Schedule Validation ==="

if [ -n "$SVC_ID" ] && [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  # Missing client name
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d "{\"service_id\":\"$SVC_ID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$TOMORROW\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$TOMORROW_END\"}" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Schedule missing client_name => 400" 400 "$code"

  # Invalid service_id
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d "{\"service_id\":\"$FAKE_UUID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"client_name\":\"Test\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$TOMORROW\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$TOMORROW_END\"}" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Schedule with invalid service => 400/404" "$code" "$code"
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if [ "$code" = "400" ] || [ "$code" = "404" ]; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: Invalid service rejected (HTTP $code)"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: Expected 400/404, got $code"
  fi
fi

###############################################################################
# 7. Find Available Staff
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Find Available Staff ==="

SEARCH_START=$(date -u -d "+2 days" '+%Y-%m-%dT10:00:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+2d '+%Y-%m-%dT10:00:00Z')
SEARCH_END=$(date -u -d "+2 days" '+%Y-%m-%dT11:00:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+2d '+%Y-%m-%dT11:00:00Z')

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" \
  "$BASE_URL/schedules/available-staff?start=$SEARCH_START&end=$SEARCH_END" -b "$JAR")
check "Find available staff" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 8. Service Update and Delete
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Service Update/Delete ==="

if [ -n "$SVC_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT "$BASE_URL/services/$SVC_ID" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"name":"Updated Consulting Service","base_price_usd":200}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Update service" 200 "$code"

  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/services/$SVC_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Delete (deactivate) service" 200 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 9. Staff Delete
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Staff Delete ==="

if [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Delete (deactivate) staff" 200 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# Summary
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "============================================"
echo "Staff & Scheduling Tests: $PASS/$TOTAL passed, $FAIL failed"
echo "============================================"

if [ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ]; then
  exit 1
fi
"}

{"file_path": "/home/eren/Documents/task4/Compliance Console/repo/API_tests/staff_scheduling_test.sh", "content": "#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

###############################################################################
# Staff & Scheduling Integration Tests
#
# Tests staff CRUD, credentials, availability, schedule creation with conflict
# detection, buffer enforcement, and capacity management.
#
# Prerequisites:
#   - Backend running on localhost:8080
#   - Admin user: admin / Admin12345!!!
###############################################################################

BASE_URL="http://localhost:8080/api"
JAR="$(mktemp /tmp/staff_test.XXXXXX)"
PASS=0
FAIL=0
TOTAL=0

trap 'rm -f "$JAR"' EXIT

check() {
  local description="$1"
  local expected_code="$2"
  local actual_code="$3"
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if [ "$actual_code" -eq "$expected_code" ]; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: $description (HTTP $actual_code)"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: $description (expected $expected_code, got $actual_code)"
  fi
}

json_field() {
  echo "$1" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('$2',''))" 2>/dev/null || true
}

###############################################################################
# Login
###############################################################################
echo "=== Admin Login ==="
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/auth/login" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"username":"admin","password":"Admin12345!!!"}' \
  -c "$JAR")
check "Admin login" 200 "$code"

# Get admin user ID
SESSION=$(curl -s "$BASE_URL/auth/session" -b "$JAR")
ADMIN_ID=$(json_field "$SESSION" "id")

###############################################################################
# 1. Service Creation (needed for scheduling)
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Service Setup ==="

SVC_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/services" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"Test Consulting","description":"Consulting service","base_price_usd":150,"tier":"standard","duration_minutes":60}' \
  -b "$JAR")
SVC_ID=$(json_field "$SVC_RESP" "id")
echo "  Service ID: ${SVC_ID:-<failed>}"

# Service validation: invalid duration
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/services" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"Bad Duration","base_price_usd":100,"tier":"standard","duration_minutes":17}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Invalid duration (17 min) => 400" 400 "$code"

# Service validation: invalid tier
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/services" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"Bad Tier","base_price_usd":100,"tier":"gold","duration_minutes":60}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Invalid tier => 400" 400 "$code"

# Service validation: missing name
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/services" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"base_price_usd":100,"tier":"standard","duration_minutes":60}' \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Service missing name => 400" 400 "$code"

# Service listing
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/services" -b "$JAR")
check "List services" 200 "$code"

# Get pricing
if [ -n "$SVC_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/services/$SVC_ID/pricing" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get base pricing" 200 "$code"

  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" \
    "$BASE_URL/services/$SVC_ID/pricing?after_hours=true&same_day=true" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get pricing with surcharges" 200 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 2. Staff CRUD
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Staff CRUD ==="

# Create staff
STAFF_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"user_id\":\"$ADMIN_ID\",\"full_name\":\"Test Staff Member\",\"specialization\":\"consulting\"}" \
  -b "$JAR")
STAFF_ID=$(json_field "$STAFF_RESP" "id")
echo "  Staff ID: ${STAFF_ID:-<failed>}"

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/staff" -b "$JAR")
check "List staff" 200 "$code"

if [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Get staff by ID" 200 "$code"

  # Update staff
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"specialization":"audit"}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Update staff specialization" 200 "$code"
fi

# Create staff missing full_name
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"user_id\":\"$ADMIN_ID\"}" \
  -b "$JAR")
check "Create staff missing name => 400" 400 "$code"

# Get non-existent staff
FAKE_UUID="00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000099"
code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/staff/$FAKE_UUID" -b "$JAR")
check "Get non-existent staff => 404" 404 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 3. Staff Credentials
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Staff Credentials ==="

if [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  # Add credential
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/credentials" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"credential_name":"CPA License","issuing_authority":"State Board","credential_number":"CPA-12345","issued_date":"2024-01-15","expiry_date":"2027-01-15"}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Add credential" 201 "$code"

  # List credentials
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/credentials" -b "$JAR")
  check "List credentials" 200 "$code"

  # Add credential missing name
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/credentials" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"issuing_authority":"State Board"}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Add credential missing name => 400" 400 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 4. Staff Availability
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Staff Availability ==="

if [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  # Add availability (Monday 9am-5pm)
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/availability" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"day_of_week":1,"start_time":"09:00","end_time":"17:00","is_recurring":true}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Add availability" 201 "$code"

  # List availability
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/availability" -b "$JAR")
  check "List availability" 200 "$code"

  # Invalid day_of_week
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID/availability" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"day_of_week":8,"start_time":"09:00","end_time":"17:00"}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Invalid day_of_week => 400" 400 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 5. Schedule Creation
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Schedule Creation ==="

if [ -n "$SVC_ID" ] && [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  # Create a schedule for tomorrow 10am-11am
  TOMORROW=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT10:00:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT10:00:00Z')
  TOMORROW_END=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT11:00:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT11:00:00Z')

  SCHED_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d "{\"service_id\":\"$SVC_ID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"client_name\":\"Test Client\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$TOMORROW\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$TOMORROW_END\"}" \
    -b "$JAR")
  SCHED_ID=$(json_field "$SCHED_RESP" "id")
  code_check=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/schedules" -b "$JAR")
  check "List schedules" 200 "$code_check"

  if [ -n "$SCHED_ID" ]; then
    echo "  Schedule ID: $SCHED_ID"

    # Overlapping schedule should fail (409)
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d "{\"service_id\":\"$SVC_ID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"client_name\":\"Overlap Client\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$TOMORROW\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$TOMORROW_END\"}" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Overlapping schedule => 409" 409 "$code"

    # Schedule within 30-min buffer should fail
    BUFFER_START=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT11:15:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT11:15:00Z')
    BUFFER_END=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT12:15:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT12:15:00Z')
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d "{\"service_id\":\"$SVC_ID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"client_name\":\"Buffer Violation\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$BUFFER_START\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$BUFFER_END\"}" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Schedule within 30-min buffer => 409" 409 "$code"

    # Schedule at exact 30-min boundary should succeed
    OK_START=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT11:30:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT11:30:00Z')
    OK_END=$(date -u -d "+1 day" '+%Y-%m-%dT12:30:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+1d '+%Y-%m-%dT12:30:00Z')
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d "{\"service_id\":\"$SVC_ID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"client_name\":\"Buffer OK\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$OK_START\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$OK_END\"}" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Schedule at 30-min boundary => 201" 201 "$code"

    # Confirm assignment
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules/$SCHED_ID/confirm" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Confirm schedule assignment" 200 "$code"

    # Cancel schedule
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/schedules/$SCHED_ID" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Cancel schedule" 200 "$code"

    # Double cancel should fail
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/schedules/$SCHED_ID" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -b "$JAR")
    check "Double cancel => 400/404" "$code" "$code"
    TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
    if [ "$code" != "200" ]; then
      PASS=$((PASS + 1))
      echo "  PASS: Double cancel rejected (HTTP $code)"
    else
      FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
      echo "  FAIL: Double cancel should not return 200"
    fi
  fi
fi

###############################################################################
# 6. Schedule Validation
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Schedule Validation ==="

if [ -n "$SVC_ID" ] && [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  # Missing client name
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d "{\"service_id\":\"$SVC_ID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$TOMORROW\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$TOMORROW_END\"}" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Schedule missing client_name => 400" 400 "$code"

  # Invalid service_id
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$BASE_URL/schedules" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d "{\"service_id\":\"$FAKE_UUID\",\"staff_id\":\"$STAFF_ID\",\"client_name\":\"Test\",\"scheduled_start\":\"$TOMORROW\",\"scheduled_end\":\"$TOMORROW_END\"}" \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Schedule with invalid service => 400/404" "$code" "$code"
  TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
  if [ "$code" = "400" ] || [ "$code" = "404" ]; then
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    echo "  PASS: Invalid service rejected (HTTP $code)"
  else
    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    echo "  FAIL: Expected 400/404, got $code"
  fi
fi

###############################################################################
# 7. Find Available Staff
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Find Available Staff ==="

SEARCH_START=$(date -u -d "+2 days" '+%Y-%m-%dT10:00:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+2d '+%Y-%m-%dT10:00:00Z')
SEARCH_END=$(date -u -d "+2 days" '+%Y-%m-%dT11:00:00Z' 2>/dev/null || date -u -v+2d '+%Y-%m-%dT11:00:00Z')

code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" \
  "$BASE_URL/schedules/available-staff?start=$SEARCH_START&end=$SEARCH_END" -b "$JAR")
check "Find available staff" 200 "$code"

###############################################################################
# 8. Service Update and Delete
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Service Update/Delete ==="

if [ -n "$SVC_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT "$BASE_URL/services/$SVC_ID" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"name":"Updated Consulting Service","base_price_usd":200}' \
    -b "$JAR")
  check "Update service" 200 "$code"

  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/services/$SVC_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Delete (deactivate) service" 200 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# 9. Staff Delete
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "=== Staff Delete ==="

if [ -n "$STAFF_ID" ]; then
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X DELETE "$BASE_URL/staff/$STAFF_ID" -b "$JAR")
  check "Delete (deactivate) staff" 200 "$code"
fi

###############################################################################
# Summary
###############################################################################
echo ""
echo "============================================"
echo "Staff & Scheduling Tests: $PASS/$TOTAL passed, $FAIL failed"
echo "============================================"

if [ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ]; then
  exit 1
fi
"}
